descriptions.text: Following the events of Super Metroid, Samus must destroy another Metroid research facility built by the Space Pirates on Planet TN578. This time however, the Pirates are more prepared to deal with Samus with the development of new weapons and armor based on Verdite technologies. It is time once again to protect the galaxy! With complete map and room overhaul, new items, new enemies, new challenge and difficulty modes and more!
